title: Flame-Forged Iron Equipment
description: Fire-forged tools of a true hero.
body:
### ABOUT
This small texture pack will replace the iron tools + bucket with their fireman counterparts! If this package receives a sufficiently positive response, I will continue to develop it, I already have ideas for this.

### USAGE
Sure, but include the name and link to this project.

### NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED
Thanks and have fun!
